title: Y@dayah #3042
definition:
Jedaiah = "praised of Jehovah"

 1) a Simeonite, forefather of Ziza
 2) son of Harumaph and one who took part in rebuilding the walls of
    Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jedaiah = "praised of Jehovah"

 1) a Simeonite, forefather of Ziza
 2) son of Harumaph and one who took part in rebuilding the walls of
    Jerusalem

    NASB:  perh. praised by Yah, two Isr.
